questionHtml:
Calculate the maximum angle β for light to travel through the fibre.

Refractive index of core       = 1.50
Refractive index of cladding = 1.48
markschemeHtml:
realization that 𝜃 min is the critical angle

𝜃 = «sin–1 1.48 1.5 =» 80.6 «°»

Accept 1.4 rad

β = «90 – 80.6 =» 9.4 «°»

Accept 0.16 rad

meta.title: Calculate the maximum angle β for light to travel through the fibre. Refractive index of core = 1.50Refractive index of cladding = 1.48
